title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama. Chat with local models, embed documents, generate images.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama. Works in Node, Bun, Deno and browsers.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embedding provider.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama. Import chats, manage models, multi-user.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with fluent builder API, streaming, and image support.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for chatting with Ollama models. Supports streaming and custom options.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Rust CLI that wraps the Ollama REST API with fuzzy model search and progress bars.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that turns any Ollama model into a GitHub Copilot replacement.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.0 integration for retrieval-augmented generation with Ollama models.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama with strongly-typed models and IAsyncEnumerable streaming.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images for CPU and GPU (CUDA/ROCm) inference.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Community Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with autoscaling and PVC support.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG example using Ollama embeddings + llama-index for local document Q&A.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that streams Ollama responses into threads with optional system prompts.

title: ollama-npm
summary: Official npm package with 50k+ weekly downloads. Zero dependencies, ESM & CommonJS.

title: ollama PyPI
summary: Official Python package with 200k+ monthly downloads. Supports sync, async, and multiplexed clients.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust crate for Ollama with serde types and streaming support via tokio.

title: ollama-zig
summary: Zig client library for Ollama with comptime JSON parsing and cross-compilation support.
